summary: Dashboard Cold Start Fix Verified: All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI shows real data from Readisys API - System Status displays 84% (2,888 READY), top bar shows 3,446 DEVICES, DI scroll shows real device alerts. Cache pre-warming working on backend startup.

minor.issue: Intermittent 'status-overview fetch failed' warnings in logs when Readisys API times out, but cache serves data correctly

passed_tests: Backend: Cache pre-warming returns data immediately after restart
Frontend: Login flow works (heart click → form → hub)
Frontend: Dashboard loads with real data
Frontend: System Status shows 84% (2,888 READY) - not 0
Frontend: DI scroll shows real device alerts from Readisys API
Frontend: Status Breakdown shows real values (READY 2,888, LOST CONTACT 142, etc.)
Frontend: Bottom bar shows real totals
Frontend: Loading state shows 'CONNECTING TO READISYS...' while fetching
Frontend: No retry button visible when data loads successfully
seed_data_creation: None - using real Readisys API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard cold start fix verified. Backend cache pre-warming (_prewarm_caches) runs on startup and fetches Readisys API data. Frontend correctly maps data.totals.total (not data.total_cameras). Loading/error states work correctly. Data takes ~18 seconds to load on first visit due to Readisys API latency, but cache serves subsequent requests quickly.

fix_verification.issue: Dashboard System Status shows 0 on production cold start
fix_verification.root_cause: Frontend was using data.total_cameras but API returns data.totals.total
fixes_applied: Backend: Cache pre-warming of Readisys API data on startup (_prewarm_caches)
Frontend: Fixed data mapping to use data.totals.total
Frontend: Added loading/error states with RETRY button

frontend_display.di_scroll: Real device alerts with ACT badges
